info.name: CFTC Commitments of Traders (COT) SODA API

params.name: $limit
params.description: Maximum number of rows to return (Socrata default 1000, max 50000)

params.name: $offset
params.description: Number of rows to skip for paging

params.name: $select
params.description: SoQL select clause specifying which columns to return

params.name: $where
params.description: SoQL where clause for filtering rows

params.name: $order
params.description: SoQL order by clause
